55:
However, the consequences of a warrior losing control of the very beast that gives him his strength can be dire. This danger has caused the way of the warrior to be largely forgotten in Eorzea, as few are prepared to shoulder such a burden.
But now, thanks to the efforts of one warrior in particular, we know how to tame the inner beast.
